feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Testing and Analysis
feed.subtitle: ABAP Testing and Analysis Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PROXY Service got deleted how to revert back the Service.
entry.content:
Hi Developers,

I'm Facing one issue in Proxy Service,

Ariba BP Create Inbound Proxy service unfortunately i deleted,

need to revert back that service,

help to resolve this issue.

Service Name:  BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In

Namespace:  http://sap.com/xi/SAP_BS_FND/MDG/Global2

i attached Quality server and Development server Proxy detail image.

#ABAP #S4Hana #SPROXY

entry.title: Problem updating delivery date (EINDT) and statistical delivery date (SLFDT) in PO badi
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Context:

Customer want's to update 3 fields with specific rules in schedule line  in ME22n. When he modifies  the delivery date (EINDT) he wants to add a certain number to this date, then he wants to cancel the standard redetermination of statiscal delivery date (SLFDT) when delivery date (EINDT is modified at screen. Finally he wants to put a certain value to ELDAT (Goods receipt date).

Problem: 

Method PROCESS_SCHEDULE of badi ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST is where i want to do my code as there are already things done for PO in this BADI. Let's say, the customer modifies delivery date from 10.01.2025 to 12.01.2025 and press ENTER. We want for example replace the 12.01.2025 with a specific rule which will lead to 15.01.2025 for EINDT. As said standard SLFDT is redetermined (note 248349) but we don't want so we set it to it's old value. Then we modifiy ELDAT with some other rule.

At the end of all of this, i check if there are differencies between LS_SCHEDULE_INIT that i loaded before doing anything and another structure LS_SCHEDULE with the possible modications. IF <> then i call the infamous SET_DATA( ls_schedule) and SET_DATA(ls_item) cause if i change the EINDT in schedule, i have also to change it in item...

This SET_DATA method triggers the reprocessing all modified objects (START method called) like SCHEDULE or ITEM and THERE IS my problem! The values that i saved at my first processing are lost when the PROCESS_SCHEDULE is triggered again, maybe because the standard have done some modifications, and i can't find a way to keep all my dermine values saved from on call to another cause values are sometimes not the same as at my first "run" in PROCESS_SCHEDULE. This is a nightmare to handle.

When several items are processed at a time, the nightmare is worse. PROCESS_SCHEDULE handles first ITEM 10 SCEDULE 0001, then ITEM 2 SCEDULE 0001 and if there were modification on one or another schedule, it's reprocessing everything in the same sequence and often wich modifications that i don't wanted...

Anyone faced the same problem? Again, I just wish to set values to EINDT SLFDT and ELDAT and tells the standard to stop messing the values i gave him.

Thanks a lot for your time.

Have a great day!

entry.title: I have 2 filters plant and material for a PP report, but I'm not able to use werks alone in sap
entry.content:
SELECTION-SCREEN: BEGIN OF BLOCK BLK1.
  PARAMETERS: P_WERKS TYPE MAST-WERKS DEFAULT '1111' OBLIGATORY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: S_MATNR FOR MAST-MATNR." NO-EXTENSION NO INTERVALS.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: S_STLAL FOR MAST-STLAL NO-DISPLAY." DEFAULT '01' NO INTERVALS.
SELECTION-SCREEN: END OF BLOCK BLK1.
PARAMETERS CHK_M NO-DISPLAY.

entry.title: Passing data from one session to another session
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to pass data from one LUW to another in my SAP system. Initially, I tried using Memory ID, but I encountered issues when multiple sessions attempted to update the same Memory ID simultaneously.

In my system, Shared Memory is not allowed, so I am exploring other options. I am considering using a persistence mechanism, but I don’t want to create a custom Z table to store the data.

Is there a way to achieve this using standard SAP features, such as persistent objects, temporary cluster tables, or any other alternatives?

Thanks in advance for your suggestions!

entry.title: TEST
entry.content: TEST

entry.title: ABAP xstring to binary for attachments in pdf
LFA1-XLFZA is initial even though Permitted Payee details created at General Data level XK03
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Im creating Vendor using API class - vmd_ei_api metho:- maintain_bapi and vendor is getting created successfully. And Permitted Payee(EMPFK) values is passed in CENTRAL_DATA-ALT_PAYEE structure and is also getting created successfully. But whenever we have value in Permitted Payee(EMPFK) then during creation the system has to set flag in LFA1-XLFZA which is currently not happening. Any reason why it is not happening? and how i can fix this issue?.  Example Screen shot

entry.title: Getting Error when releasing the backup TR and could not create the package.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are encountering an error when attempting to import the Transport Request (TR) by creating a backup TR in the production environment. The error message indicates that 'Error when releasing the backup TR and could not create the package.' We have verified all the objects, and the package is available for all the objects we created.The package being used already exists in the production system. However, this issue only occurs for newly created objects (class, domain, structure). This problem has not been encountered in the quality or staging systems during deployment. We are using the SolMan (Active Control) tool for this deployment activity. 

Note: Upon checking the TADIR table, we found that all the erroneous objects do not have any package assigned in the production system, whereas they do have a package in the QA system.

entry.title: Why I am not able to see the Branch Section in my ABAPGit Offline repository?
entry.content:
I have created the Offline repository in ABAPGit. I have created the Package and also added one code in to this package. But I am not avble to see the 'Branch' Section in it. 

Does anyone has an idea about how to activate the branch in offline repo so that I can make a branch and do the further development without disturbing the actual code.

entry.title: Error during import of clipboard contents
entry.content:
Using FM: ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE, we tried to execute the program in background, but we encountered this error "Error during import of clipboard contents".


When we run it in foreground, it is working normally. may we know what would be the resolution for this?

entry.title: Error while copying ATC Variant "ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT"
entry.content:
Hi All,

While trying to create a custom ATC variant by copying "ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT", I am getting the below error "The implementing class CL_CI_TEST_EXTENDED_CHECK_SEC is marked as internal". Did any of you face this issue? Could you please let me know how to resolve this?

 

Best regards,

Narsi

entry.title: How to avoid hard coding for if condition.
entry.content:
Hi all,

i am writing code to check sales org condition IF VBAK-VKORG = '0090' , and after checking that if it is true, then i am checking IF   VBAK-AUART = 'some types'. if true, Then my logic.

This is working properly,

but now i want to avoid this hard coding method, and want to implement using some custom table things.

i had a custom table Z_tab in this i had fields like zprogname , zparaname , zseralno , zparameter1 zparameter2...3..4..  etc .

can you guide me how can i implement this using that table.

and all this things are a small part for an enhancement in some SAP standard program.

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Praveen

entry.title: How to Retrieve Aggregated Data from a CDS View Cube in ABAP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am still relatively new to working with CDS views and have little experience in this area. I have created an analytical CDS view (cube) and an analytical query in SAP.

In the transaction RSRTS_ODP_DIS (Transient Provider) I can view the aggregated result of my CDS View Cube - in my case several totals. However, when I run the CDS View Cube in Eclipse, it behaves like a normal CDS View and does not perform any aggregations or calculations.

My question: How can I programmatically retrieve the aggregated result of the CDS View Cube that I see in transaction RSRTS_ODP_DIS within in a class or ABAP program?
My goal is to enrich this aggregated data in a DPC class with additional information and then make it available in an OData service via a function import.

Has anyone encountered a similar scenario or has an idea how to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Configuring the Remote ATC Central Check System in a S/4HANA consolidation/test system
entry.content:
Hello

I have a question for configuring Central ATC check system for our SAP S/4HANA 2023 systems.

First a bit of background for our requirement:

We have a dual S/4hana landscape one for Production Support(BAU changes) and one for Project Development work.
Our current dual S/4HANA landscape consist of the following:
BAU Dev(PSD) -> BAU Quality(PSQ) -> Pre-Prod(PRE) -> Production(PRD)
&
Project Dev(DEV) -> Project Quality(QAS) -> Pre-Prod(PRE) -> Production(PRD)

We have configured ChaRM with retrofit in our Solution Manager system 7.2 SP14.

We are looking into using enhanced retrofit s/4hana check for retrofitting changes from source system BAU Dev(PSD) on SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS00(lower release) into target system Project Dev(DEV) on SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01(higher release) as per the SAP Note 2504773 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2504773

Once of the prerequisite for retrofitting changes between systems on different release or support package level is to have a Central ATC system(ATC hub) configured and connect the Solution manager system to the ATC hub, see below sap help link for more information.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/afb05ae119a0408dada0200502a8d419.html?locale=en-US&version=7.2.14

So my question is whether can we use our existing Project Quality(QAS) system and configure it as an Central ATC system(ATC HUB) and connect both the development systems to ATC hub Project Quality(QAS) system and connect Solman to ATC hub and use the cross release checks for s/4hana for retrofitting?

We do not have a sandbox system in our landscape, so can we use our existing quality system as Central ATC system for this purpose?

@OlgaDolinskajaand @DoloresCorreayour views would be appreciated here. 

Thanks & Regards,

Sharyu

entry.title: Issue with Setting Up GOS (Generic Object Services) in Custom Transaction
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing issue while generating Service Object Services in my custom transaction.

I tried this code which i got from google :

    CREATE OBJECT lo_gos_manager
      EXPORTING
        is_object    = VALUE borident( objtype = 'BUS001'    " Business Object type for Plant
                                       objkey  = gv_plant )  
        ip_mode      = 'S'                                   
        ip_no_commit = 'R'                                   " Prevent commit conflicts
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS = 1.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE 'Error initializing GOS Manager' TYPE 'E'.
    ENDIF.

*    " Start GOS with a standard service like attachment
    CALL METHOD lo_gos_manager->start_service_direct
      EXPORTING
        ip_service = 'SGS_SRVNAM'  " Use a valid GOS service name
        is_object  = VALUE borident( objtype = 'BUS001' objkey = gv_plant )
        ip_no_check = abap_true           " Skip availability check for smoother execution
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS = 1.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE 'Error starting GOS Service' TYPE 'E'.
    ENDIF.

But i am getting an error that "Error starting GOS Service".

I am very new to this type scenario

My implementation project is replica of MM01 t-code

Could you please help me on this?

entry.title: Is there a way to put an editor lock to ATC Check variant in ATC -> Manage Variants?
entry.content: Is there a way to put a lock to ATC Check variant in ATC -> Manage Variants so that no one tampers the variant configuration?

entry.title: Local ATC Checks fail with incorrect message "Execution of check seemingly aborted"
entry.content:
Hello,

When running ATC checks with any variant, the result is a failure with warning message "Execution of check seemingly aborted" - which is incorrect.
We are running the ATC Check locally on our S/4 Development System (no rfc involved). We have already implemented SAP Notes 3232321 and 3163848.
All guides I've found so far seem to be for remote checks from a central ATC System, which does not apply to us, so I'd be happy about any tips.

entry.title: converting SCMON data to an aggregated data manually
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

 

We are starting a S/4 Hana conversion project. I enabled SCMON in production system on October in 2024 and downloaded SCMON data each week since system deletes data older than a week. I didn't know we need to aggregate data in order to add aggregated data in Custom Code Migration app in SAP Fiori App. 

 

Is it possible to upload SCMON data from the excel file to aggregated data tables? If yes can you please direct us for doing it?

 

Thanks and kind regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there a way to detect whether a BAPI is for read or write through metadata?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any bapi attribute or any other details in the BAPI metadata that can be used to determine if the BAPI is for read or write?

BAPI_USER_GETLIST - reads list of all users - so a read bapi

BAPI_PO_CREATE1 - creates a purchase order - so a write bapi

BAPI_USER_LOCK - changes state of a user to locked - a write bapi

Note: NWRFCSDK is being used for fetching BAPI metadata and other details

Thanks.

entry.title: When I move to Quality system from Dev my BW Query OData service, it is moved "proforma".
entry.content:
Hello to all of you. The problem is as follows:

I develop OData service with all the artifacts based on Query. The tests are ok, and when I move to Quality system I see that in the service persists in /iwfnd/maint_service but the REG_SERVICE and REG_MODEL tables doesnt have the corresponding records. The service and its belonging model are missing.
For example the Model (XXXX_MDL) is available in table /IWBEP/I_MGW_OHT in the development system, but when moved it is missing in quality. When I execute the service in /iwfnd/gw_client, I got status code Error 500 - No service found for namespace /SAP/.....
